asset_contract.inpaint_control_policy: Uses Image Tab source image plus painted mask/source mask assets; no separate generated map is required for future adapters.
asset_contract.map_preview_policy: Phase F records map job contracts and generated map refs; pixel preprocessing remains deferred to Comfy/local fallback execution phase.
asset_contract.mask_policy: control_masks are retained only for units with mask_mode=control_mask
asset_contract.outpaint_control_policy: Uses Image Tab source image, Phase H/J source-resolution policy, padding, and optional padded canvas/mask assets; adapters may generate canvas/mask from padding.

notes: Unlocked only for txt2img/generate and img2img on active Flux/Qwen base routes. Inpaint/outpaint remain gated until route-specific conditioning proof is added.
Future family support requires exact compiler proof. Wan/Hunyuan remain provider-gated by support matrix. Flux/Qwen txt2img/img2img are now covered by controlnet_flux_qwen_conditioning.
SD 1.5 uses compatible ControlNet node shapes but remains experimental until direct V2 smoke generation is validated.
Phase B declares V1 parity boundaries; graph patch implementation is intentionally deferred to workflow patch phases.

controlnet_tasks.execution_note: P9.2 promotes Qwen Image Edit, Qwen Rapid AIO, and Qwen Image Edit 2509 ControlNet routes across safetensors/components, checkpoint AIO, and GGUF. Qwen map control uses Qwen/InstantX or compatible standard ControlNet nodes; inpaint/outpaint use Qwen DiffSynth/InstantX adapters and must not fall back to SD/Flux behavior.

description: Built-in ControlNet extension with P9.2 Qwen-group enablement: Qwen Image Edit, Qwen Rapid AIO, and Qwen Image Edit 2509 routes use Qwen-safe map, DiffSynth model-patch, and InstantX adapter lanes instead of SD/Flux fallback graphs.
implementation_notes: P9.3 promotes Flux Klein safetensors/components and GGUF ControlNet through Flux2/Klein Fun Union route profiles; no SD/Flux1/Qwen/ZImage fallback is allowed.
name: ControlNet

node_discovery.provider_gating_policy: Missing base nodes gate the extension for active routes. Missing node-required preprocessors gate only the selected unit/preprocessor.

controlnet_qwen_adapter.execution_note: Used only for qwen_image GGUF/checkpoint_aio inpaint_control/outpaint_control routes.

controlnet_task.execution_note: map_control remains the only generic patcher task. inpaint_control/outpaint_control can be selected in UI but stay planned_gated until adapter phases.
controlnet_task.ui_selector: ControlNet Usage selector in inpaint/outpaint modes

payload_contract.frontend_emitter: controlNetPayloadPreview(record) emits extensions.image.controlnet with inputs/params/assets/metadata and strips disabled/gated state to inactive block
payload_contract.inactive_route_policy: normalize_payload(..., enforce_route_state=True) returns a disabled block with safe requested summary and no active inputs/params/assets

supported_route_state_policy.available: Workflow patching is allowed for the route/task adapter.
supported_route_state_policy.experimental_available: Workflow patching is allowed with experimental metadata.
supported_route_state_policy.implementation_target: A family/loader profile exists, but the adapter is not promoted yet.
supported_route_state_policy.planned_gated: The base image route or ControlNet route is not ready.

ui_schema.route_visibility_policy: available/experimental_available render normally; planned_gated/provider_gated render only in expert diagnostics; unsupported hidden
ui_schema.task_selector_policy: Only visible in Image inpaint/outpaint modes; selector changes params.controlnet_task without unlocking adapter-gated execution.

workflow_patch_contract.asset_resolver: backend/asset_resolver.py resolves source/mask/canvas assets; Phase P executes experimental Qwen GGUF/Rapid AIO inpaint/outpaint adapters through DiffSynth model patch or InstantX ControlNet.
gates: missing control image or generated map
advanced mode requested without advanced apply node
inpaint_control missing source image or mask image
outpaint_control missing source image/padding or padded canvas node
workflow_patch_contract.graph_mutation: Map control adds LoadImage, ControlNetLoader, and ControlNetApply nodes. SD adapters reuse source/padded canvas. Qwen DiffSynth adds ModelPatchLoader + QwenImageDiffsynthControlnet and rewires KSampler model. Qwen InstantX adds ControlNetLoader/Apply with source/canvas image plus mask-aware inputs and rewires KSampler conditioning.
workflow_patch_contract.mutates_when: enabled payload, active route state, required nodes, required unit model, and required control image/generated map are present
workflow_patch_contract.ordering: Runs after prompt/embedding/LoRA conditioning graph preparation and before sampler execution; does not mutate model/clip refs.
